global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with various app interface elements and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting the StarVault app with new content available weekly.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: App interface display
elements.description: A rectangular area showing a simplified app interface with geometric shapes, suggesting a digital environment.

elements.label: Additional app interface
elements.description: Another rectangular area displaying more geometric shapes, indicating features of the app.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A collection of geometric shapes, including circles and rectangles, arranged in a visually appealing manner.

elements.label: Highlighted app feature
elements.description: A prominent rectangular area showcasing a feature of the app, filled with abstract shapes.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned within the app interface, adding detail to the design.

elements.label: Another small icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon, similar to the previous one, enhancing the app interface.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The logo of 'StarVault' displayed prominently at the top, featuring bold typography.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Binge starts now New hits every week' positioned centrally, conveying the main message.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now New hits every week

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button labeled 'Get offer' at the bottom, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small text label 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, positioned at the top.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, StarVault logo, promotional text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
